# Stack Architecture

## Language & Runtime
- **Primary language:** Python 3.11+
- **Runtime:** CPython (no async/await in codebase)
- **Concurrency:** `threading.Event` for stop signaling

## Dependencies

| Package | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| `click` | >=8.1 | CLI framework |
| `rich` | >=13.0 | Terminal UI |
| `sounddevice` | >=0.4 | PortAudio audio I/O |
| `numpy` | >=1.26 | Audio buffer operations |
| `scipy` | >=1.11 | (declared, not yet used) |

## Build System
- **Build tool:** hatchling (via `pyproject.toml`)
- **Entry point:** `spectral = "spectral.cli:main"`

## Project Layout
```
spectral/
├── src/spectral/        # src-layout package
│   ├── __init__.py      # version only
│   ├── cli.py           # click commands
│   ├── engine.py        # SoundEngine class
│   └── moods.py         # MOODS dict (data only)
├── pyproject.toml
└── README.md
```

## Sample Rate
- `SAMPLE_RATE = 44100` (module-level constant in `engine.py`)
- All audio generation uses this constant — no hardcoding elsewhere
